full_text:
Mao Jiong 毛炅
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mao Jiong (毛炅). Made General, plotted to raid Tao Huang but was discovered and executed. Mao Jiong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
